details.test: Task 1: Add two cheapest low-light indoor plants under $25 with 4+ stars to cart
Task 2: Create account and add top-rated succulent-like plant to wishlist
Task 3: Buy cheapest free-shipping plant under $40 and select Standard Shipping
Task 4: Choose larger planter-equivalent under $30 between first two options
Task 5: Build order and adjust subtotal to be at or below $100
Task 6: Subscribe every 4 weeks to highest-rated plan under $30 and complete checkout
Task 7: Add gift plant with specific delivery date and message to cart
Task 8: Save pet-safe easy-care hanging plant under 50 cm with 4+ stars to wishlist
Task 9: Build bundle over $50 and apply coupon GREEN10
